pi_items.source: setup_task.sh calls setup_task_project('create_inline_link_project') in task_utils.sh, which appends '_project', resulting in a double '_project' suffix.
setup_task.sh calls setup_task_project('create_inline_link_project') in task_utils.sh, which appends '_project', resulting in a double '_project' suffix.
setup_task.sh explicitly injects a requirement with 'id': 'SRS-001' into SRS.json.
NEEDS.json from ExampleProject does not contain any node with id 'NEED-001'. setup_task.sh even prints a warning that it is missing.
setup_task.sh injects the text 'This system behavior is derived directly from NEED-001 to ensure compliance.' into SRS-001.

privileged_info_summary: The task setup script injects a target requirement SRS-001 into SRS.json containing the link text 'NEED-001'. However, the target requirement 'NEED-001' does not exist in the NEEDS document. Furthermore, the task setup creates the project directory at '/home/ga/Documents/ReqView/create_inline_link_project_project' (double '_project' suffix), contradicting the metadata paths and causing the verifier to look in the wrong location.
